business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

coverages_discussed.notes: Form CP 00 10 10 12; total policy premium $403,697.14; valuation at Actual Cash Value unless Replacement Cost optional coverage elected; subject to 90% coinsurance and $50,000 deductible
Subject to 90% coinsurance and $50,000 deductible; stock valued at selling price minus applicable discounts and charges

Endorsement effective 03/15/2026; Coverage A pays for loss in value of undamaged portion of building when a Covered Cause of Loss triggers enforcement of ordinance or law requiring demolition in whole or in part
Endorsement effective 03/15/2026; covers direct physical loss to Covered Property caused by Equipment Breakdown accident to mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment objects listed in Schedule
Endorsement effective 03/15/2026; covers direct physical loss to Covered Property caused by interruption of water supply, communication supply, and power supply services to described premises

positives: Coinsurance set at 90%, satisfying the threshold that activates all Coverage Extensions (Newly Acquired or Constructed Property up to $250,000/building, Personal Effects and Property of Others up to $2,500/premises, Valuable Papers and Records up to $2,500/premises, Property Off-Premises up to $10,000, Outdoor Property up to $1,000/occurrence, Non-Owned Detached Trailers up to $5,000)
Broad endorsement package adds Ordinance or Law, Equipment Breakdown, and Utility Services Direct Damage coverages effective mid-policy (03/15/2026)

Multiple Additional Coverages included: Debris Removal (25% of loss plus deductible, with $25,000 supplemental), Preservation of Property (30-day window), Fire Department Service Charge ($1,000, no deductible), Pollutant Clean Up and Removal ($10,000/premises/12-month period), Increased Cost of Construction ($10,000), and Electronic Data ($2,500/year minimum)

Payments under Fire Department Service Charge, Pollutant Clean Up and Removal, Increased Cost of Construction, and Electronic Data Additional Coverages are in addition to applicable Limits of Insurance
Mortgageholder protections included; insurer must provide 10-day notice of cancellation for nonpayment and 30-day notice for all other reasons
Appraisal mechanism available for dispute resolution on value or loss amount
concerns: Default valuation is Actual Cash Value (with depreciation deduction); Replacement Cost coverage is an Optional Coverage that must be shown in Declarations and requires property to be actually repaired or replaced before payment on that basis

Vacancy provision: if building vacant more than 60 consecutive days prior to loss, coverage is excluded entirely for vandalism, sprinkler leakage, building glass breakage, water damage, theft, and attempted theft; all other covered causes of loss subject to a 15% reduction in otherwise payable loss
Coinsurance penalty applies at each loss occurrence if property is underinsured relative to required percentage of total value at time of loss
Increased Cost of Construction Additional Coverage capped at $10,000 or actual loss, whichever is less — potentially inadequate for large commercial structures
Electronic Data Additional Coverage limited to $2,500 per policy year unless a higher limit is shown in Declarations
Outdoor signs attached to buildings subject to sublimit of $2,500 per sign per occurrence
Numerous property categories explicitly excluded from Covered Property (currency, accounts, land, foundations below grade, personal property while airborne or waterborne, etc.)
No loss history, safety program information, or financial data present in document
Three endorsements share a single mid-term effective date (03/15/2026), indicating coverage gaps during the initial 8.5 months of the policy period for those coverages

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas. SIC Code 6512. Producer: Texas Commercial Insurance Partners.
